channel.title: Diagrams on upyesp
channel.description: Recent content in Diagrams on upyesp

item.title: Add UML & Other Diagrams To Markdown With PlantUML
item.description: PlantUML provides an extensive markup language to describe diagrams. The resulting diagrams can be exported to many formats, including graphics files such as .png, .svg and document formats such as .pdf and .html.

item.title: Add Diagrams To Markdown Using Mermaid
item.description: Mermaid provides a markup language to describe diagrams. Describing diagrams in text brings many advantages.
